description_long: This is a hardbound book with a light gray or off-white cover, featuring a minimalist design. The front cover is adorned with a thin red rectangular border and a bold, black, crescent-shaped graphic element near the lower right. The book's title is printed in a simple, modern font near the top center of the cover. The spine is similarly colored and includes the title and a small black crescent motif. The book appears to be of medium thickness, with visible page edges and a sturdy, slightly textured surface. There are no elaborate illustrations or decorative elements beyond the geometric motif.
description: A hardbound, light gray book with a minimalist cover featuring a red border and a black crescent graphic. The title is printed in a modern font on the front and spine.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the front, showing the cover's red border, black crescent graphic, and the title text clearly.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the top edge, emphasizing the flatness of the cover and the placement of the graphic and title.
description_view_2: The book is seen from the bottom edge, with the cover design partially visible and the thickness of the book more apparent.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the spine, displaying the title text and a small black crescent motif along the spine.
attribute_cover_illustration: No illustration visible. The cover features only a geometric black crescent shape and a thin red border.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is light gray with the title printed horizontally in a simple font and a small black crescent motif. The design is minimalist and matches the front cover.
